Flow.description: Subscriber-namespace test flow used by the flow-as-trigger-action release-testing Phase 5B. Creates a Contact without LastName so the platform raises REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING at runtime. The unhandled fault propagates to Flow.Interview.start() as a runtime exception that the trigger framework routes through FailureAction__c. Used to exercise the LogAndContinue and BlockDml strategies end-to-end across the subscriber namespace boundary.
Flow.label: TST Subscriber Flow Always Fail

recordCreates.description: Creates a Contact without LastName. Platform raises REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING at runtime; with no fault connector, the flow surfaces an unhandled fault to Flow.Interview.start().
recordCreates.name: CreateInvalidContact
recordCreates.label: Create Invalid Contact

variables.description: Trigger record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow. Required by the variable-contract scanner; not mutated by this flow.
variables.name: record

variables.description: Pre-update record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow on update events. Read-only.
variables.name: recordPrior
